trends.name: Wide-Leg Pants Domination
trends.what: Wide-leg pants in every fabric — linen, satin, denim, tailored. Geniş paça is the default silhouette for Spring 2026.
trends.why_now: Post-skinny era is fully established. Comfort-meets-elegance is the dominant aesthetic. Both fast fashion (Zara, H&M) and editorial sources confirm this as the baseline pant shape.
how: Pair with a fitted blazer for smart-casual balance
Cropped top + wide-leg linen pant for effortless summer look
Platform sandals to elongate the silhouette

trends.name: Structured Blazer Renaissance
trends.what: Tailored blazers in navy with gold buttons, white oversize kruvaze, and linen-blend options. The blazer is the Spring 2026 jacket.
trends.why_now: Smart-casual dressing is mainstream. The blazer bridges casual and dressed-up, fitting the 'quiet luxury' aesthetic that Gen Z adopted from TikTok.
how: Navy blazer + white wide-leg pants for classic polish
White oversize blazer as a dress alternative
Linen blazer + bermuda for warm-weather tailoring

trends.name: Linen Everything
trends.what: Linen-blend blazers, pants, shirts, and dresses dominating new arrivals. The texture of Spring 2026.
trends.why_now: Sustainability awareness meets summer practicality. Linen signals effortless European style that Gen Z aspires to.
how: Full linen suit (blazer + barrel pant) for maximum impact
Linen oversize shirt as beach-to-city transition piece
Mix linen textures (shirt + pant) for tonal dressing

trends.name: Warm Neutrals Palette
trends.what: Ekru, bej, krem, devetüyü — warm neutrals are the dominant color family across all sources.
trends.why_now: Clean girl aesthetic evolution. 'Quiet luxury' influence filtered down to fast fashion. Neutrals photograph well for Instagram/TikTok content.
how: Head-to-toe neutral for Clean Girl / Old Money aesthetic
Use texture contrast (satin + linen) when going monochrome
Add one accent color (red, yellow) to avoid looking washed out

trends.name: Balloon & Volume Silhouettes
trends.what: Balloon sleeves, balloon-cut shirts, puffed silhouettes in both tops and outerwear. Volume is the new fitted.
trends.why_now: Dramatic silhouettes stand out on social media. It's a shift from bodycon toward statement dressing.
how: Balloon sleeve top + slim bottom for proportion balance
Balon kesim gömlek tucked into high-waist pants
Layer balloon jacket over minimal basics

trends.name: Lace & Crochet Details
trends.what: Dantel midi etekler, tığ işi bluzlar, nakış detayları — artisanal handcraft touches on modern silhouettes.
trends.why_now: Romantic/feminine aesthetic is resurging. Crochet went from boho niche to mainstream fast fashion.
how: Dantel midi etek + simple tee for contrast
Crochet top + tailored pants for unexpected pairing
Layer lace details under blazer for peek-through texture

trends.name: Denim Evolution
trends.what: Beyond jeans: denim maxi dresses, peplum denim jackets, embroidered denim. Plus new jean silhouettes: kapri, barrel, baggy.
trends.why_now: Denim is perpetual but the forms are evolving. The denim dress and peplum jacket signal denim as a 'fabric for everything' moment.
how: Denim maxi dress as a one-piece statement
Peplum denim jacket over a summer dress
Mix denim washes for a modern double-denim look

trends.name: Cropped Flares Comeback
trends.what: Cropped flare pants making a return with modern styling to avoid looking dated.
trends.why_now: Cyclical trend revival. Wide-leg fatigue creates demand for new bottom silhouettes. WWW editorial validation.
how: Platform shoes are essential with cropped flares
Keep the top slim and tucked to modernize the look
Choose high-waist version for a flattering fit

trends.name: Sportif Chic Aesthetic
trends.what: Athletic-inspired pieces styled in a polished way — the NYC/LA It aesthetic for Spring 2026.
trends.why_now: Post-athleisure evolution. The sporty look gets dressed up instead of being purely casual.
how: Track-inspired pants + blazer
Sneakers with tailored pieces
Sport-luxe accessories (caps, athletic bags) with feminine outfits

trends.name: Peplum Revival
trends.what: Peplum details on denim jackets and shirts. A 2010s trend returning with a modern twist.
trends.why_now: Cyclical fashion revival. The waist-defining silhouette appeals to both feminine and structured aesthetics.
how: Peplum denim jacket over simple dress
Peplum top tucked slightly for modern proportion
Keep the rest of the outfit minimal

colors.name: Ekru / Krem
colors.where: Full outfits, especially pants and blazers
colors.combo: Ekru + taba, ekru + lacivert, all-ekru monochrome

colors.name: Beyaz
colors.where: Blazers, pants, shirts — the clean canvas

colors.name: Açık Mavi
colors.combo: Açık mavi + beyaz, açık mavi + ekru

colors.name: Taba / Toprak Rengi
colors.combo: Taba + krem, taba + beyaz for euro-chic

colors.name: Pembe
colors.combo: Pembe + beyaz, pembe + ekru for soft feminine look

colors.name: Kırmızı / Mercan
colors.combo: Kırmızı + siyah classic, kırmızı + lacivert for bold

watch_list.name: Western Style Revival
watch_list.reason: Editorial push for boots, fringe, western-inspired pieces. Could hit fast fashion in 1-2 months.

watch_list.name: Cummerbund as Accessory
watch_list.reason: Runway signal from major house. If adopted by influencers, could become viral accessory.

watch_list.name: Barrel Pants
watch_list.reason: New silhouette — wider at thigh, tapered at ankle. Could be the next wide-leg evolution.

watch_list.name: Vintage Print Patterns (Pucci-style)
watch_list.reason: Print trend replacing last year's vintage obsession. Watch for fast fashion adoption.

watch_list.name: Color Clashing / Maximalism
watch_list.reason: Counter-trend to neutrals dominance. Could appeal to Gen Z's desire to stand out.
